zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Holand of Sharples於大約1248年出生在英國藍卡爾武普 霍蘭時，他的父親Sir Thurstan de Holand28歲，母親de Kellet22歲。他於大約1274年與Joan de Latham在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1314年在英國藍卡爾沙普萊斯享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Holand of Sharples于大约1248年出生在英国藍卡爾武普 霍蘭时，他的父亲Sir Thurstan de Holand28岁，母亲de Kellet22岁。他于大约1274年与Joan de Latham在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1314年在英国藍卡爾沙普萊斯享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Holand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Holland
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Holand of Sharples was born about 1248, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Thurstan de Holand, was 28 and his mother, de Kellet, was 22. He married Joan de Latham about 1274, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1314, in Sharples, Lancashire, England, at the age of 67.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Holand of Sharplesが約1248年にイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドで生まれた時，父Sir Thurstan de Holandは28歳，母de Kelletは22歳であった。約1274年にイギリスランカシュアイアでJoan de Lathamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1314年にイギリスランカシュアイアシャルプレスで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Holand of Sharples(이)가 대략 1248년 영국 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thurstan de Holand(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 de Kellet(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1274년 영국 랭카실르에서 Joan de Latham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1314년 영국 랭카실르 샤르플레스에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.
